sessions.intent: Design UI module piece 6: Liquid template rendering via Fluid

before.assumptions: Pieces 1-4 done (identity, crypto, signing, http). Piece 5 (cleanup) merged. Runtime1 has TemplateEngineModule (Scriban) and UiModule (DOM/layout). Ingi wants single module, Liquid syntax, Fluid library.
before.risk: Low — design only, no code changes.

sessions.plan: Single ui module with render action. Fluid (Liquid) as default provider. Memory stack accessible by default. Custom callGoal tag. No DOM/layout in scope.

actions.context: Architect plan for UI module template rendering

after.health: Design approved by Ingi. Ready for scaffolding.
after.notes: Key decisions: no separate template module, Fluid not Scriban, {{ }} syntax stays, callGoal needed for builder.

sessions.intent: Design test suite for UI module: template rendering via Fluid

before.assumptions: Architect plan approved. Single render action with ITemplateProvider (FluidProvider default). Memory stack accessible in templates. Custom callGoal tag. Partials via Fluid built-in include.
before.risk: Low — test stubs only, no production code.

sessions.plan: 22 test stubs: 17 C# (core render, variable resolution, callGoal/include, provider/path) + 5 PLang integration tests. Parameters changed to List<Data> per Ingi's direction.

actions.context: 17 C# test stubs covering render behavior, variable resolution, custom tags, provider swap, path resolution
5 PLang integration test goals for full pipeline validation
Changed Render.Parameters from Dictionary<string, object?> to List<Data> per Ingi's direction

after.health: All test stubs written. Ready for coder.
after.notes: 22 tests total. Key change: Parameters is List<Data> not Dictionary.

sessions.intent: Implement UI module: Liquid template rendering via Fluid

before.assumptions: Architect plan and test stubs exist. No production code yet. Fluid.Core NuGet needs to be added.
before.risk: Medium — new module with external dependency (Fluid). callGoal integration requires engine access from template context.

sessions.plan: Create ITemplateProvider, render action, FluidProvider. Register in Engine. Implement 29 C# tests. Write 5 PLang test goals.

actions.context: UI module production code — action handler, provider interface, Fluid implementation
Added Fluid.Core 2.31.0 (upgraded from 2.11.1 due to .NET 10 include tag parsing bug)
Wrote real PLang test goals with fixture template files

after.health: All 29 C# tests pass (1886 total, 0 failures). PLang tests written but not built (require LLM builder).
after.notes: Key issues: Fluid 2.11.1 had .NET 10 include parsing bug — upgraded to 2.31.0. callGoal uses RegisterExpressionTag for quoted string support. PlangFileProvider strips .liquid extension for Fluid compatibility.

sessions.intent: Code analysis of UI module: OBP compliance, simplification, readability, behavioral reasoning, deletion test

before.assumptions: UI module implemented with FluidProvider, render action, ITemplateProvider. 29 tests pass. Also includes clone family fixes (PathData, IdentityData, DataList, Properties) and DefaultEvaluator catch broadening.
before.risk: Low — analysis only, no code changes.

sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis on new/changed files: render.cs, FluidProvider.cs, ITemplateProvider.cs, plus clone fixes in Data.cs, PathData.cs, IdentityData, MemoryStack.cs, Properties.cs.

actions.context: 5-pass code analysis: 1 major (clone metadata), 1 medium (catch-all), 1 minor (nested try/catch), 2 deletion-test gaps

after.health: NEEDS WORK — clone overrides drop base Data metadata, catch-all in FluidProvider masks programming errors
after.notes: UI module (render.cs, ITemplateProvider) is clean OBP. FluidProvider has 2 catch-all issues. Clone family fixes introduced 3 incomplete overrides. Recommend sending to coder.

sessions.intent: Re-review coder fixes for v1 findings: clone metadata, catch filters, path resolution

before.assumptions: Coder addressed all 3 findings in commit 3dcd2359.

sessions.plan: Field-by-field clone verification, catch filter review, TryResolvePath behavioral check.

actions.context: All 3 findings resolved. One naming nit (TryResolvePath). Two deletion-test gaps remain for tester.

after.health: PASS — all findings resolved, recommend tester next
after.notes: Clone overrides verified field-for-field. Catch filters correct. TryResolvePath naming nit is cosmetic.
